sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5950" key="a)mfi/mhlon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίμηλον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n5950.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">probe with two ends,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:7:14:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.14.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
